title: trifolium repens subsp. biasolettii
intro: Trifolium repens subsp. biasolettii, also known as the white clover, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family and is native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe digestive issues and its anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Trifolium repens subsp. biasolettii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is also used as a nutritional supplement due to its high content of vitamins and minerals.
